name: ROCKWELL MEDICAL, INC.
summary: Rockwell Medical, Inc. is a healthcare company that develops, manufactures, commercializes, and distributes hemodialysis products for dialysis providers worldwide. The company supplies liquid and dry acid and bicarbonate concentrates for dialysis patients, primarily in the United States. Products are manufactured at facilities in Michigan and Texas under cGMP regulations and delivered to dialysis clinics via company trucks and third-party carriers. Rockwell serves 294 customers including all five leading U.S. dialysis providers.

products.name: Liquid Acid Concentrates
products.description: Hemodialysis liquid acid concentrates used to create dialysate for cleaning patients' blood.

products.name: Dry Acid Concentrates
products.description: Dry formulation acid concentrates for hemodialysis treatment at dialysis clinics.

products.name: Bicarbonate Concentrates
products.description: Liquid and dry bicarbonate concentrates used in hemodialysis treatment.

products.name: Single-Use Bicarbonate Cartridge
products.description: FDA 510(k)-approved single-use bicarbonate cartridge available in 720g and 900g sizes, launched February 2025.

products.name: Dry Acid Concentrate Mixers
products.description: Mixers for dry acid concentrates manufactured at Iowa facility.

products.name: CitraPure
products.description: Registered trademark hemodialysis concentrate product by Rockwell Medical.

products.name: Dri-Sate
products.description: Registered trademark dry hemodialysis concentrate product by Rockwell Medical.

products.name: RenalPure
products.description: Registered trademark hemodialysis concentrate product by Rockwell Medical.

products.name: SteriLyte
products.description: Registered trademark hemodialysis concentrate product by Rockwell Medical.

partnerships.description: Amended product purchase agreement extended through December 31, 2026 with increased product pricing.
Multi-year product purchase agreement signed July 2025 with one of the largest U.S. dialysis service providers.

partnerships.partner_name: Innovatus Life Sciences Lending Fund I, LP
partnerships.description: Loan and Security Agreement providing financing to Rockwell Medical.
